GrammarCreation.title: Grammar Creation
GrammarCreation.description: A grammar instruction page created by a user.

title.description: The title of the grammar page.

description.description: A short summary of the page content.

elements.description: A list of UI elements that make up the page.

authorId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the creator.

isPublic.description: Whether the creation is shared publicly.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Private profile information for a user.

/creations/{creationId}.description: The main collection of grammar instruction pages.
